missables: Al Bhed Primer Vol. XVIII — outside the main entrance. Missable if you rush past.
Al Bhed Primer Vol. XIX — near the dead body, left of the entrance outside Home. PERMANENTLY MISSABLE — Home is destroyed after this chapter.
Al Bhed Primer Vol. XX — south living quarters, on the bed. PERMANENTLY MISSABLE.
Al Bhed Primer Vol. XXI — northeast corridor, on the floor. PERMANENTLY MISSABLE.
Special Sphere — east living quarters, password chest. PERMANENTLY MISSABLE.
Skill Sphere — east living quarters, quiz chest. PERMANENTLY MISSABLE.

subLocations.name: Home Exterior
subLocations.prose: After meeting Cid, search the area outside Home before going in. Primer XVIII is right outside the main entrance on the ground — grab it immediately. Fiends swarm the area in waves as you push forward, so you won't get a quiet moment to backtrack. Prioritize clearing the exterior enemies quickly so you can enter and sweep all three interior Primers before the destruction cutscene — this entire location is permanently gone afterward, and the interior Primers are among the easiest missables in the game.

items.name: Hi-Potion ×2 (search the dead body near the entrance)
Al Bhed Primer Vol. XIX (near the dead body, left of entrance)

subLocations.name: Home Interior
subLocations.prose: Three Primers are permanently missable once Home is destroyed — don't rush. Primer XIX is in the room where the forced fight occurs; check the bed at the back before engaging. At the three-way fork, go RIGHT down the northeast corridor for Primer XXI on the floor, then come back and take the left/straight path for Primer XX. The two Al Bhed puzzle chests in the inner rooms contain a Friend Sphere and a Skill Sphere — the correct answers are listed in the guide if you're short on Primers to translate them yourself.

items.name: Al Bhed Primer Vol. XX (south living quarters, on the bed)
Al Bhed Primer Vol. XXI (northeast corridor, on the floor)
Al Bhed Potion ×4 (hidden behind smoke, bottom of south stairs)
Friend Sphere (south living quarters — vocabulary-test chest)
Special Sphere (east living quarters — password chest)
Skill Sphere (east living quarters — quiz chest)
Lv. 4 Key Sphere (under the stairs, crumbling city)
Lv. 2 Key Sphere (far right, before Summoner's Sanctum)
